channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Musk's Missteps: White House Bureaucratic Blunders Exposed on Social Media
item.description: Elon Musk's blundering posts on X and Bluesky have been met with expert explanations, revealing a lack of understanding about government systems, data science, and more.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Microsoft quietly updates Copilot to cut down on unauthorized Windows activations
item.description: Microsoft has updated Windows Copilot in a bid to cut down on unauthorized activations of its latest operating system.
item.dc:creator: alekshamcloughlin@outlook.com (Aleksha McLoughlin), TechRadar

item.title: Bang & Olufsen's latest reworked turntable is a masterpiece of retro revival, in a breathtaking wooden presentation box
item.description: A design classic returns and is even more desirable than before – but don't expect to see them in stores.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 might improve on its predecessor in one crucial way
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 could come with a larger battery than the current-gen Galaxy Z Flip 6, a welcome improvement for any folding phone.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Deep tech disruption: How advanced technologies are transforming businesses
item.description: CEOs, CIOs and CFOs are finding that “deep tech” is actively driving business innovation and profitability. From AI models that boost sales to robots that slash production costs, advanced technologies are transforming both top-line growth and bottom-line efficiency.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Is your disaster recovery a house of cards? Why BIA, BCP, and DRP are your foundation
item.description: Disaster recovery is more than just an “IT issue.” In fact, successful recovery from cyberattacks and other disasters hinges on an approach that integrates business impact assessments (BIA), business continuity planning (BCP), and disaster recovery planning (DRP) including rigorous testing.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: LA Times to give op-eds AI-generated political rating, list of alternate views
item.description: The Los Angeles Times has launched an AI-driven "bias meter" to provide readers with alternative perspectives on opinion content.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, The Hill

item.title: Everything you need to know about the Oscars’ AI controversy
item.description: Sometimes, authenticity can be a film’s most special effect. It took months for Best Actress front-runner Mikey Madison to learn how to pole dance like the titular exotic dancer in Anora and for her fellow nominee Timothée Chalamet to passably play guitar as Bob Dylan in A Complete Unknown.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Amazon claims to cut quantum computing timeline by 5 years with new Ocelot chip
item.description: Amazon Web Services has unveiled a new quantum computing chip, Ocelot, that the company claims could reduce error correction costs by up to 90% compared to traditional approaches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How secure information sharing can be easier, less burdensome
item.description: Bill Anderson, the principal product manager at Mattermost, said agencies need to understand how to remove some of the complexities to improve collaboration. The post How secure information sharing can be easier, less burdensome first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft’s Phi-4-multimodal AI model handles speech, text, and video
item.description: Microsoft has introduced a new AI model that, it says, can process speech, vision, and text locally on-device using less compute capacity than previous models.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Future of Cloud Infrastructure: IBM's $6.4 Billion Acquisition of HashiCorp
item.description: IBM closes its $6.4 billion buy of Hashicorp, aiming to infuse automation and security technology in every data center possible.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: LexisNexis’ Jake Nelson on potential of genAI to support legal services
item.description: Generative AI tools can help agencies’ legal teams tackle repetitive tasks, LexisNexis’ general manager of emerging products says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: LexisNexis’ Jake Nelson on potential of genAI to support legal services first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: DeepSeek offers steep discounts, escalating AI price war
item.description: Chinese AI firm DeepSeek has unveiled a significant price reduction for developers using its AI models, a move that could intensify competition among both domestic and global rivals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Meet the AI real estate agent making millions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
